name: Buttercup Diamond Vintage Persian Woven Rug - Threshold™
description:
Give your indoor space a touch of global-inspired style with this Diamond Woven Rug from Threshold™. Made with a latex backing to help keep it in place , this rectangular area rug is designed to feel soft under your feet while standing up to high-traffic areas in your home. The rectangular area rug features an intricate diamond and patterned motif to freshen up any space and helps create a variety of decor possibilities. Rug Pad Recommended.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
